design_philosophy: Objective, authoritative, and data-driven. High contrast elements to distinguish truth from fiction. Employs a 'Swiss Brutalist' grid layout with stark borders to emphasize analytical accuracy.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, rigid lines, visible 1px borders, no soft shadows, bento box inspired)

components.card: border border-slate-300 bg-white shadow-none transition-colors hover:border-slate-400
components.button_primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-400 focus:outline-none
components.input: border-slate-300 focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 bg-slate-50 rounded-none px-4 py-3
components.badge_real: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-300 uppercase text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1
components.badge_fake: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-300 uppercase text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1

motion_and_interactions.hover_state: Slight border darken, crisp background color shifts.

media_urls.description: Close-up of keyboard keys spelling 'NEWS' on a red background

accessibility_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid (e.g., 'verify-url-button', 'news-history-item', 'url-input')

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @fontsource/chivo and @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans. Use them strictly for headings and body respectively.
Create a visible, technical grid layout with strict 1px borders dividing sections. Avoid soft box-shadows. Use 'border-slate-300' to create visible dividing lines between all dashboard sections.
The Fake/Real verdict should be massive and highly contrasted to draw immediate attention. Use the designated badge styles.
Use Recharts (if needed) or simple HTML/Tailwind progress bars to show confidence scores in a technical, objective way.
Implement the Google News integration or mock it properly if the actual API requires paid credentials. If mocked, indicate clearly.
Ensure the AI explanation looks analytical—perhaps using a monospace font fragment or a structured list.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states that meet 3:1 minimum contrast change.
